204875+-204875==i[r]then i[r],S[r]=nil,nil end r=N[z]end end,{},function(N,z)local V=n(z)local g=function(g,j,v,l,b,S,i)return r(N,{g,j,v;l,b,S,i},z,V)end return g end,function(N,z)local V=n(z)local and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[z(741906-764960)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
